title: BaseBlock
description: Universal per-IC facts present for every datasheet regardless of category. Referenced from extraction.schema.json under the 'base' key. Category-specific facts live in <category>.schema.json extensions.

family.description: Human-readable functional family (e.g. 'step-down switching regulator', 'ARM Cortex-M4 MCU', 'rail-to-rail opamp'). Prose, not enum.

description.description: One-line part description (e.g. '3A, 150 kHz adjustable buck regulator').

length.description: Body length in millimeters along the longest axis.

width.description: Body width in millimeters along the perpendicular-to-length axis.

height.description: Body height in millimeters (package thickness / standoff direction).

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the fact was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. '6.4 Electrical Characteristics') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this fact. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the fact was captured. 'table' = parameter table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = read off a graph. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other facts.

thermal.description: Thermal characteristics keyed by parameter name (e.g. 'theta_ja', 'theta_jc', 'psi_jt'). Values are SpecValue[] in K or °C.

absolute_max.description: Absolute-maximum ratings keyed by parameter name (e.g. 'VIN_max', 'TJ_max', 'IOUT_max'). Values are SpecValue[]. Exceeding these kills the part.

recommended_operating.description: Recommended operating conditions keyed by parameter name (e.g. 'VIN', 'TA', 'VDDIO'). Values are SpecValue[]. Spec behavior guaranteed only within these.

esd.description: ESD ratings keyed by test model (e.g. 'HBM', 'CDM', 'MM'). Values are SpecValue[] in V.

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the fact was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. '6.4 Electrical Characteristics') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this fact. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the fact was captured. 'table' = parameter table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = read off a graph. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other facts.

compliance.description: Compliance / qualification marks (e.g. AEC-Q100 grade, IEC 62368 rating, ISO 13485).

rating.description: Rating within the mark when applicable (e.g. 'Grade 1' for AEC-Q100).

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the fact was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. '6.4 Electrical Characteristics') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this fact. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the fact was captured. 'table' = parameter table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = read off a graph. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other facts.

pinout.description: Full pinout array. Defers to pinout.schema.json so pin shape evolves independently.

pin_relationships.description: Structured cross-pin relationships (optional). Free-form relationships go in pin.notes.

type.description: Relationship kind. Closed starter vocabulary for v1.4 — adding a new kind requires a minor schema bump (see schemas/CHANGELOG.md). Consumers should tolerate unknown kinds by ignoring the relationship, not erroring.

pins.description: Pin numbers involved in this relationship.

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the fact was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. '6.4 Electrical Characteristics') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this fact. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the fact was captured. 'table' = parameter table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = read off a graph. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other facts.
